title: Explicit cast allowlist for User schema
prompt: Write MyApp.Accounts.User.changeset/2 that explicitly casts only [:email, :name, :bio]. Do NOT include :is_admin, :role, or other privileged fields in the cast list even if they exist in the schema. This is Ecto's explicit-allowlist discipline against mass assignment. Write to lib/my_app/accounts/user.ex.
tier_rationale: Single cast list with a clear allow/deny. Easy but discriminates against the is_admin-in-cast anti-pattern that Phoenix's own security guide calls out.
research_citation: Phoenix security guide: 'The problem is that :is_admin should never be set via external user input.'
